NCT01866111.label: Outcome
NCT01866111.text: Studies were performed with aortas isolated from wild type or hemizygous arginase 1 knockout (Arg1+/-) mice and bovine aortic endothelial cells exposed to high glucose (HG, 25 mmol/l) or normal glucose (NG, 5.5 mmol/l) conditions for different times.

NCT02091375.label: Outcome
NCT02091375.text: Complete or partial pain relief at end of follow-up was achieved in 23 of 40 patients (58%) in the early surgery vs 16 of 41 (39%)in the endoscopy-first approach group (P = .10).
